title: mangifera foetida var. leschenaultii
intro: Mangifera foetida var. leschenaultii, also known as the Horse Mango or the Indian Cow's Mango, is a plant species that belongs to the Anacardiaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Mangifera foetida var. leschenaultii include its potential to aid in reducing fever, treating various skin conditions, and supporting digestive health. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and seeds are often used to make teas, infusions, and ointments, which can be applied topically or consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
